top_signals.title: Only High-Earning Britons Are Defying the Energy Shock, GfK Says
top_signals.summary: Confidence among the lowest-earning Britons plunged in May and even those on average pay are digging into savings to meet everyday expenses as the Iran energy shock hits household budgets, a key survey found.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
